---
title: "Research & Publications"
---

<style>
#category-pills .category-pill {
  color: #6c757d;
  border: solid 1px #dee2e6;
  border-radius: .25rem;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  font-size: .65em;
  padding-left: .5em;
  padding-right: .5em;
  padding-top: .15em;
  padding-bottom: .15em;
  cursor: pointer;
  margin-right: 4px;
  margin-bottom: 4px;
  transition: all 0.2s ease-in-out;
}
#category-pills .category-pill.active {
  background-color: var(--bs-primary);
  color: white;
  border-color: var(--bs-primary);
}
</style>

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
library(jsonlite)

# 0. Filters
publications <- tryCatch({
  read_json("www/publications.json")
}, error = function(e) list())
presentations <- tryCatch({
  read_json("www/presentations.json")
}, error = function(e) list())
posters <- tryCatch({
  read_json("www/posters.json")
}, error = function(e) list())
events <- tryCatch({
  read_json("www/events.json")
}, error = function(e) list())

pub_cats <- unique(unlist(lapply(publications, function(x) x$keywords)))
pres_cats <- unique(unlist(lapply(presentations, function(x) x$keywords)))
poster_cats <- unique(unlist(lapply(posters, function(x) x$keywords)))
event_cats <- unique(unlist(lapply(events, function(x) x$keywords)))
all_categories <- unique(c(pub_cats, pres_cats, poster_cats, event_cats))
all_categories <- all_categories[all_categories != ""]
if (length(all_categories) > 0) {
  all_categories <- sort(all_categories)
}

cat('<div class="d-flex flex-wrap mb-4" id="category-pills">\n')
cat('<div class="category-pill active" data-category="all">All</div>\n')
if (length(all_categories) > 0) {
  for (cat in all_categories) {
    cat(sprintf('<div class="category-pill" data-category="%s">%s</div>\n', cat, cat))
  }
}
cat('</div>\n')

# 1. Publications List
cat('<div class="quarto-listing quarto-listing-container-default" id="listing-listing">\n')
cat('<div class="list quarto-listing-default" id="publications-list">\n')

if (length(publications) > 0) {
  for (i in seq_along(publications)) {
    item <- publications[[i]]
    keywords <- item$keywords
    if (is.null(keywords)) keywords <- list()
    
    data_categories_raw <- paste(keywords, collapse=",")
    data_categories <- jsonlite::base64_enc(URLencode(data_categories_raw, reserved=TRUE))
    
    cats_html <- ""
    for (cat in keywords) {
      escaped_cat <- gsub("'", "\\\\'", cat)
      cats_html <- paste0(cats_html, sprintf('<div class="listing-category" onclick="window.filterPublications(\'%s\'); event.preventDefault(); event.stopPropagation(); return false;" style="cursor:pointer;">%s</div>\n', escaped_cat, cat))
    }
    
    url <- if (!is.null(item$url) && item$url != "") item$url else "#"
    title <- if (!is.null(item$title)) item$title else ""
    journal <- if (!is.null(item$journal)) item$journal else ""
    date <- if (!is.null(item$date)) item$date else ""
    authors <- if (!is.null(item$authors)) item$authors else ""
    image <- if (!is.null(item$image)) item$image else ""
    
    target <- if (url != "#") 'target="_blank"' else ''
    linkStartTitle <- if (url != "#") sprintf('<a class="no-external" href="%s" %s>', url, target) else '<span class="no-external" style="color: inherit;">'
    linkEndTitle <- if (url != "#") '</a>' else '</span>'
    
    linkStartMeta <- if (url != "#") sprintf('<a class="no-external" href="%s" %s>', url, target) else '<div class="no-external">'
    linkEndMeta <- if (url != "#") '</a>' else '</div>'
    
    thumbnail_html <- ""
    image_class <- ""
    if (image != "") {
      image_class <- " image-left"
      thumbnail_html <- sprintf('\n<div class="thumbnail">\n<a class="no-external" href="%s" %s>\n<p><img loading="lazy" src="%s" class="thumbnail-image"></p>\n</a>\n</div>', url, target, image)
    }
    
    cat(sprintf('
<div class="quarto-post%s" data-index="%d" data-categories="%s">%s
<div class="body">
<h3 class="no-anchor listing-title">
%s%s%s
</h3>
<div class="listing-subtitle">
%s%s%s
</div>
<div class="listing-categories">
%s
</div>
</div>
<div class="metadata">
%s
<div class="listing-date">
%s
</div>
<div class="listing-author">
%s
</div>
%s
</div>
</div>\n', image_class, i-1, data_categories, thumbnail_html, linkStartTitle, title, linkEndTitle, linkStartTitle, journal, linkEndTitle, cats_html, linkStartMeta, date, authors, linkEndMeta))
  }
}

cat('</div>\n')
cat('<div class="listing-no-matching d-none">No matching items</div>\n')
cat('</div>\n')

# 2. Presentations
cat('\n# Presentations\n\n')
cat('<div class="quarto-listing quarto-listing-container-default">\n')
cat('<div class="list quarto-listing-default">\n')
tryCatch({
  for (i in seq_along(presentations)) {
    item <- presentations[[i]]
    url <- if (!is.null(item$url)) item$url else "#"
    title <- if (!is.null(item$title)) item$title else ""
    type <- if (!is.null(item$type)) item$type else ""
    description <- if (!is.null(item$description)) item$description else ""
    date <- if (!is.null(item$date)) item$date else ""
    event <- if (!is.null(item$event)) item$event else ""
    event_url <- if (!is.null(item$event_url)) item$event_url else ""
    context <- if (!is.null(item$context)) item$context else ""
    context_url <- if (!is.null(item$context_url)) item$context_url else ""
    image <- if (!is.null(item$image)) item$image else ""
    keywords <- if (!is.null(item$keywords)) item$keywords else list()
    
    data_categories <- ""
    cats_html <- ""
    all_item_cats <- list()
    if (type != "") all_item_cats <- c(all_item_cats, type)
    if (length(keywords) > 0) all_item_cats <- c(all_item_cats, unlist(keywords))
    
    if (length(all_item_cats) > 0) {
      data_categories_raw <- paste(all_item_cats, collapse=",")
      data_categories <- jsonlite::base64_enc(URLencode(data_categories_raw, reserved=TRUE))
      for (cat in all_item_cats) {
        escaped_cat <- gsub("'", "\\\\'", cat)
        cats_html <- paste0(cats_html, sprintf('<div class="listing-category" onclick="window.filterPublications(\'%s\'); event.preventDefault(); event.stopPropagation(); return false;" style="cursor:pointer;">%s</div>\n', escaped_cat, cat))
      }
    }

    subtitle <- sprintf('a %s %s', type, description)
    if (event != "") {
      subtitle <- paste0(subtitle, if (event_url != "") sprintf(', presented at <a href="%s" target="_blank">%s</a>', event_url, event) else sprintf(', presented at %s', event))
    }
    if (context != "") {
      subtitle <- paste0(subtitle, if (context_url != "") sprintf(', <a href="%s" target="_blank">%s</a>', context_url, context) else sprintf(', %s', context))
    }
    
    target <- if (url != "#") 'target="_blank"' else ''
    
    thumbnail_html <- ""
    image_class <- ""
    if (image != "") {
      image_class <- " image-left"
      thumbnail_html <- sprintf('\n<div class="thumbnail">\n<a class="no-external" href="%s" %s>\n<p><img loading="lazy" src="%s" class="thumbnail-image"></p>\n</a>\n</div>', url, target, image)
    }
    
    cat(sprintf('
<div class="quarto-post%s" data-index="%d" data-categories="%s">%s
<div class="body">
<h3 class="no-anchor listing-title">
<a class="no-external" href="%s" %s>%s</a>
</h3>
<div class="listing-subtitle">
%s
</div>
<div class="listing-categories">
%s
</div>
</div>
<div class="metadata">
<a class="no-external" href="%s" %s>
<div class="listing-date">
%s
</div>
</a>
</div>
</div>\n', image_class, i-1, data_categories, thumbnail_html, url, target, title, subtitle, cats_html, url, target, date))
  }
}, error = function(e) NULL)
cat('</div>\n')
cat('</div>\n')

# 3. Posters
cat('\n# Posters\n\n')
cat('<div class="quarto-listing quarto-listing-container-default">\n')
cat('<div class="list quarto-listing-default">\n')
tryCatch({
  for (i in seq_along(posters)) {
    item <- posters[[i]]
    url <- if (!is.null(item$url)) item$url else "#"
    title <- if (!is.null(item$title)) item$title else ""
    type <- if (!is.null(item$type)) item$type else ""
    description <- if (!is.null(item$description)) item$description else ""
    date <- if (!is.null(item$date)) item$date else ""
    event <- if (!is.null(item$event)) item$event else ""
    event_url <- if (!is.null(item$event_url)) item$event_url else ""
    image <- if (!is.null(item$image)) item$image else ""
    
    subtitle <- sprintf('a %s %s', type, description)
    if (event != "") {
      subtitle <- paste0(subtitle, if (event_url != "") sprintf(', presented at <a href="%s" target="_blank">%s</a>', event_url, event) else sprintf(', presented at %s', event))
    }
    
    target <- if (url != "#") 'target="_blank"' else ''
    
    thumbnail_html <- ""
    image_class <- ""
    if (image != "") {
      image_class <- " image-left"
      thumbnail_html <- sprintf('\n<div class="thumbnail">\n<a class="no-external" href="%s" %s>\n<p><img loading="lazy" src="%s" class="thumbnail-image"></p>\n</a>\n</div>', url, target, image)
    }

    keywords <- item$keywords
    if (is.null(keywords)) keywords <- list()
    
    data_categories_raw <- paste(keywords, collapse=",")
    data_categories <- jsonlite::base64_enc(URLencode(data_categories_raw, reserved=TRUE))
    
    cats_html <- ""
    for (cat in keywords) {
      escaped_cat <- gsub("'", "\\\\'", cat)
      cats_html <- paste0(cats_html, sprintf('<div class="listing-category" onclick="window.filterPublications(\'%s\'); event.preventDefault(); event.stopPropagation(); return false;" style="cursor:pointer;">%s</div>\n', escaped_cat, cat))
    }
    
    cat(sprintf('
<div class="quarto-post%s" data-index="%d" data-categories="%s">%s
<div class="body">
<h3 class="no-anchor listing-title">
<a class="no-external" href="%s" %s>%s</a>
</h3>
<div class="listing-subtitle">
%s
</div>
<div class="listing-categories">
%s
</div>
</div>
<div class="metadata">
<a class="no-external" href="%s" %s>
<div class="listing-date">
%s
</div>
</a>
</div>
</div>\n', image_class, i-1, data_categories, thumbnail_html, url, target, title, subtitle, cats_html, url, target, date))
  }
}, error = function(e) NULL)
cat('</div>\n')
cat('</div>\n')

# 4. Events
cat('\n# Events organization\n\n')
cat('<div class="quarto-listing quarto-listing-container-default">\n')
cat('<div class="list quarto-listing-default">\n')
tryCatch({
  for (i in seq_along(events)) {
    item <- events[[i]]
    url <- if (!is.null(item$url)) item$url else "#"
    title <- if (!is.null(item$title)) item$title else ""
    description <- if (!is.null(item$description)) item$description else ""
    date <- if (!is.null(item$date)) item$date else ""
    details <- if (!is.null(item$details)) item$details else ""
    image <- if (!is.null(item$image)) item$image else ""
    keywords <- item$keywords
    if (is.null(keywords)) keywords <- list()
    
    data_categories_raw <- paste(keywords, collapse=",")
    data_categories <- jsonlite::base64_enc(URLencode(data_categories_raw, reserved=TRUE))
    
    subtitle <- description
    if (details != "") subtitle <- details
    
    target <- if (url != "#") 'target="_blank"' else ''
    
    thumbnail_html <- ""
    image_class <- ""
    if (image != "") {
      image_class <- " image-left"
      thumbnail_html <- sprintf('\n<div class="thumbnail">\n<a class="no-external" href="%s" %s>\n<p><img loading="lazy" src="%s" class="thumbnail-image"></p>\n</a>\n</div>', url, target, image)
    }
    
    cat(sprintf('
<div class="quarto-post%s" data-index="%d" data-categories="%s">%s
<div class="body">
<h3 class="no-anchor listing-title">
<a class="no-external" href="%s" %s>%s</a>
</b></h3>
<div class="listing-subtitle">
%s
</div>
</div>
<div class="metadata">
<a class="no-external" href="%s" %s>
<div class="listing-date">
%s
</div>
</a>
</div>
</div>\n', image_class, i-1, data_categories, thumbnail_html, url, target, title, subtitle, url, target, date))
  }
}, error = function(e) NULL)
cat('</div>\n')
cat('</div>\n')
```

<script>
  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
    const list = document.getElementById('publications-list');
    const pillsContainer = document.getElementById('category-pills');

    window.filterPublications = function(category) {
      document.querySelectorAll('#category-pills .category-pill').forEach(pill => {
        if (pill.getAttribute('data-category') === category) {
          pill.classList.add('active');
        } else {
          pill.classList.remove('active');
        }
      });

      const listItems = document.querySelectorAll('.quarto-post');
      listItems.forEach(item => {
        if (category === 'all') {
          item.style.display = '';
        } else {
          const itemCatsBase64 = item.getAttribute('data-categories');
          if (itemCatsBase64) {
            const itemCats = decodeURIComponent(atob(itemCatsBase64)).split(',');
            item.style.display = itemCats.includes(category) ? '' : 'none';
          } else {
            item.style.display = 'none';
          }
        }
      });
    };

    if (pillsContainer) {
      pillsContainer.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
        if (e.target.classList.contains('category-pill')) {
          window.filterPublications(e.target.getAttribute('data-category'));
        }
      });
    }
  });
</script>
